name: aoa-routing-advisory-route-authority-boundary
proof_question: Can aoa-routing preserve the owner agent-skill catalog, capability graph, typed eval dependencies, and owner-layer shortlist hints without becoming skill activation, capability, proof, or verdict authority?
origin_need: The routing repo projects callable bundles from the aoa-skills agent catalog and points deeper navigation to the owner capability graph. Repeated OS Abyss work depends on that route remaining advisory and on task-local DAG composition staying outside repository truth.
summary: Capture routing-local eval pressure for checking that generated route hints preserve callable-bundle, typed-capability, and owner boundaries and route stronger meaning or execution decisions back to their owners.
object_under_evaluation: aoa-routing skill catalog, capability graph, typed dependency, and owner-layer navigation
expected_use_when: an agent relies on generated owner-layer shortlist hints to choose an owner repo
an agent inspects the owner skill catalog or expands into the owner capability graph
routing outputs mention aoa-evals, aoa-skills, or other stronger owners and must remain advisory
blind_spot_notes: does not prove the generated router is globally correct
does not decide a central aoa-evals verdict or regression status
does not grant skill activation authority to aoa-routing
does not replace aoa-skills source meaning or central aoa-evals proof doctrine
